advisory.summary: Current heat index is 48°C (danger). Prioritize hydration, shade, and reduced outdoor exposure. Keep hydration in mind today.
actions: Review current heat index and postpone high-exertion outdoor activity if needed.
Ensure drinking water access in classrooms and activity areas.
Monitor students for early heat stress signs and escalate to clinic when needed.
safetyTips: Encourage frequent hydration every 15 to 20 minutes during hot periods.
Use shaded or indoor alternatives for PE and assemblies when risk is elevated.
Coordinate with class advisers for at-risk students and immediate cooling response.
advisory.scopeNote: Only system-provided weather, humidity, and heat-index inputs are used.

rationale: Heat index and humidity indicate elevated heat stress potential.
Recommendations are constrained to school operations and student safety.
